name: Torq Private Channel Sync
description: This PlugIn forwards private channel events (messages, membership changes) to Torq via HTTP webhook trigger.

settings_schema.header: Configure where private channel events are sent for Torq ingestion.

settings.help_text: The configured Torq webhook trigger URL where events will be POSTed (generally `https://hooks.[eu.|jp.]torq.io/v1/webhooks/<UUID>`). This is required.

settings.display_name: Torq Webhook Authentication Header Name (Auth secret header)
settings.help_text: The Name of your Shared Secret Authentication Header. Configure the matching key as a condition in your Torq webhook trigger. This is optional, but recommended.

The Shared Secret Authentication Header value sent with the defined auth header. Configure the matching value as a condition in your Torq webhook trigger. This is required only if you're defining an Auth header.
If enabled, events from every private channel are forwarded. If disabled, only channels listed below are forwarded.
Only used when 'Sync all private channels' is disabled. Comma-separated list of channel IDs to forward events for.
If disabled, only metadata (channel, user, post ID, timestamp) is sent — not the message text. If disabled, a separate action will be required to pull the payload
